headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -40.2)
key_insights: Fears trending up 23% over 7 days (moderate momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 132 quotes, including a massive 104 at strong intensity - people are expressing serious anger and dissatisfaction today.
• Despite the high quote volume, the frustration score dropped significantly from yesterday's peak but remains well above the typical range.
• Both fears and optimism are notably suppressed, sitting in the bottom half of their historical ranges.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
